meaning: n.木板,(供特殊用途的)木板,甲板,膳食费用,会议桌,部vt.用板盖上,包饭,提供膳食,上(船、飞机等)
examples: She jumped off the top board.
He's on the board of directors.
She was co-opted onto the board.
Any proposals relating to pay are negotiated at Police Negotiating Board in the usual way.
Second, BAE's owners, as opposed to its board, aren't weeping about the collapse of the deal.
